Reviews Contact

About Summit Physical Therapy

12+ years serving Boise and surrounding areas

Founded in 2012, Summit Physical Therapy grew from a small practice near the Boise River Greenbelt to become Ada County's most recommended clinic. Our team understands how Idahoans live, work, and play.

We combine evidence-based techniques with practical knowledge of mountain sports, agricultural demands, and seasonal weather challenges. From ski injuries at Bogus Basin to gardening strains in the Bench neighborhood, we've seen it all.

As Boise grows, we're committed to preserving personalized care. A portion of every visit funds youth sports programs at local schools.

12+ Years in Business
8,000+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Summit Physical Therapy

Trusted physical therapy professionals serving Boise, ID and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.

555-phy-r91
